privileged_info_summary: I verified that the data is real, originating from the official UDST sanfran_urbansim repository via GitHub. Running the expected accessibility calculations locally on the downloaded sanfran_public.h5 dataset confirms there are exactly 190 valid zones for analysis, mapping 225,439 jobs. All metadata expectations regarding output paths, output columns, and data paths explicitly match the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
